title: Haapsalu, Lääne County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Haapsalu, Lääne County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Haapsalu is a city in Lääne County with a population of 10,000. A picturesque coastal resort town on the Baltic Sea, known for its historic bishop’s castle, healing mud baths, charming wooden architecture, and the Kuursaal promenade.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
